ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the project location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the project location */,
  "precision_code" INTEGER /* Precision code for the geographical coordinates */,
  "geoname_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geoname (city or town) */,
  "geoname" TEXT /* Name of the geoname (city or town) */,
  "adm1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative division 1 (region) */,
  "adm1_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division 1 (region) */,
  "adm2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative division 2 (district) */,
  "adm2_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division 2 (district) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the project */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, On Hold, Terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of donor (e.g., Government, Non-Governmental Organization, Private Sector) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the donor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the donor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., Country, Organization) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the recipient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "date_of_agreement" TEXT /* Date of agreement for the project */,
  "date_of_planned_completion" TEXT /* Planned completion date of the project */,
  "total_cost_to_2011" REAL /* Total cost of the project up to 2011 */,
  "total_disbursement_to_2011" REAL /* Total disbursement of the project up to 2011 */,
  "type_of_assistance" TEXT /* Type of assistance provided (e.g., Loan, Grant) */,
  "project_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the project */,
  "project_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the project */,
  "project_challenges" TEXT /* Challenges faced during the project */,
  "project_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the project on the community */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Total budget of the project */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Current funding status (e.g., Fully Funded, Partially Funded, Not Funded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was approved or rejected */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Water, Sanitation and Irrigation) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sectors" (
  "project_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-sector entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sectors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sectors_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdgs" (
  "mdg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDG */,
  "mdg_name" TEXT /* Name of the MDG (e.g., Sustainable Economic Growth) */,
  "mdg_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the MDG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_mdgs" (
  "project_mdg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-MDG entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "mdg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MDG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_mdg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mdgs_mdg_id FOREIGN KEY ("mdg_id") REFERENCES mdgs ("mdg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mdgs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the project manager */,
  "manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
